the sermon on the mount.example_clue: As recounted in Matthew 5, this oration contains the admonition to turn the other cheek & not seek revenge after an injury

king david.example_clue: Benjamin Netanyahu's Bar Mitzvah portion covered this aged king's sex life in 1 Kings

leah & rachel.example_clue: The progenitors of the Tribes of Israel, Jacob's 12 sons were born to this pair of sisters & their maidservants

lamentations.example_clue: This book whose name means "expressions of sorrow" is read on the ninth of Av, a Jewish observance marking the Temples' destruction

bethany.example_clue: The book of Luke says that Jesus ascended into heaven at this village outside Jerusalem where his friend Lazarus lived

adam.example_clue: "The example of Jesus... is like that of" this man; Allah "said to him, 'be,' and he was"

moses.example_clue: "And" he "said, 'O Pharaoh, I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds'"

noah.example_clue: He said, "O my son, come aboard with us and be not with the disbelievers"

lot.example_clue: "We will surely save" this man "and his family, except his wife. She is to be of those who remain behind"

the queen of sheba.example_clue: A tafsir, or commentary, says this royal "set forth from her country and reached Jerusalem"

a coat of many colors.example_clue: "Now Israel" (fka Jacob) "loved Joseph more than all his children... & he made him" this splendid garment

false prophets.example_clue: "Beware of" these "which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves"

fishers of men.example_clue: From Matthew 4:19: "and he saith unto them, follow me, and I will make you" these 3 words

to everything there is a season.display: To everything there is a season
to everything there is a season.example_clue: These famous words in Ecclesiastes precede "and a time to every purpose under the heaven"

inherit the wind.example_clue: The book of Proverbs tells us "He that troubleth his own house shall" do this

boxing.example_clue: Ring magazine proclaims itself "the Bible of" this sport

scales.example_clue: "The Bible of the Trumpet", "Arban's Complete Conservatory Method" teaches major, minor & chromatic these

wine.example_clue: With articles like "Rosé Myths", Decanter magazine has been called "the Bible of" this

karate.example_clue: The bubishi, an ancient self-defense text used by Okinawan masters, has been published as "the Bible of" this

euclid.example_clue: His " Elements " is often called "the Bible of mathematics"
